allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', d['status'], '| Hazards synced:', d['hazards_synced']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Hazards in DB:', len\(d['hazards']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Trip started. session_id:', d['session_id'][:8]+'...'\)")
